'''Banz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] who studied in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Banz was brought into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to receive [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. A member of the [[Bergruutfa Clan]], a [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] known for its members intense loyalty, [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] Banz and his peers were placed under the tutelage of the [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quarmall]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the Bergruutfas' unorthodox Master took the unprecedented move of taking the entire clan as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]].<ref name="Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous">{{InsiderCite|86|Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous}}</ref>

Master Quarmall directed his students aboard a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]]-crafted [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] during the war, until the ship was ambushed and boarded by the [[Supreme Commander of the Confederation military|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]. As their Master lay in a heap, the Berfruutfas were herded aboard Grievous' ship and taken to [[Gentes/Legends|Gentes]] for experimentation. Remaining calm, Initiate Banz stayed close with his peer, [[Allara]] and worked to keep everyone calm. After staging a breakout, the Initiates and a group of [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] refugees crossed paths with Padawan [[Codi Ty]]. He and his master, [[B'dard Tone]] were infiltrating the facility in an attempt to assassin Grievous, but the mission had gone awry. Sensing his Master's death, Ty escort the children out of the facility and back to the Coruscant Temple. There, Allara pleaded with the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to allow Ty to stay in the Order, but the august body dismissed him for insubordination.<ref name="SWGG" />
